system_boundary.name: Agent Relay
system_boundary.description: Real-time agent-to-agent communication system for spawning and coordinating AI agents

containers.name: Relay CLI
containers.description: CLI entry point that orchestrates the broker and exposes the agent-relay command

containers.name: Broker Binary
containers.description: Statically-linked WebSocket broker that spawns agents as PTY subprocesses and routes messages

containers.name: TypeScript SDK
containers.description: Client library consumed by developers to spawn agents and send messages

containers.name: OpenClaw Gateway
containers.description: Inbound gateway that receives messages from external platforms and delivers them to agents

containers.name: OpenClaw Web
containers.description: Web dashboard for managing OpenClaw workspace configuration and agents

external_systems.name: Relaycast Cloud
external_systems.description: WebSocket relay backbone that brokers messages between agents

external_systems.name: Claude CLI
external_systems.description: Anthropic Claude coding agent spawned as a PTY subprocess

external_systems.name: Codex CLI
external_systems.description: OpenAI Codex coding agent spawned as a PTY subprocess

external_systems.name: PostHog
external_systems.description: Product analytics and telemetry event collection

external_systems.name: SQLite
external_systems.description: Local persistence for relay state and session data

external_systems.name: Fly.io
external_systems.description: Cloud platform hosting the Agent Relay API and web dashboard

relationships.description: Spawns and manages the broker subprocess
Sends protocol commands to spawn agents and route messages
Connects via WebSocket for cross-process message relay
Spawns Claude as a PTY subprocess and injects messages
Spawns Codex as a PTY subprocess and injects messages
Subscribes to inbound message events from the relay backbone
Delivers inbound messages to agents via the relay SDK
Deployed as a web app on Fly.io / SST

people_container_mappings.description: Imports SDK to build multi-agent applications
Runs the CLI to start the relay and manage agents
